projects.name: E-commerce website for cosmetics—AURORA
projects.description: Built Aurora, a Django-based e-commerce site with product search, cart, secure checkout, and payment integration. Created an intuitive interface and admin dashboard with optimized performance, secure authentication, and efficient inventory, order, and user management.

projects.name: Insights on SDG 12 – Responsible Consumption and Production
projects.description: Analyzed global food production and consumption patterns using Power BI, focusing on wheat production trends, hemispheric comparisons, and resource allocation to align with SDG 12: Responsible Consumption and Production. Built Power BI dashboards to visualize production costs, highlight top producers, and support sustainable agriculture insights.

projects.name: Electricity Board Management—ELECTRO
projects.description: Built Electro, a Django-based system for online bill payments, service requests, and supply chain management. Designed a clean interface and integrated supply chain features, cutting service request time and enhancing user experience.

projects.name: Customer Data Analysis Tool—CDAT
projects.description: Developed CDAT, a tool for analyzing and visualizing customer behavior through segmentation by gender, geography, and other factors. Implemented secure user access and provided insights into top customers, products, and brands.

work_history.title: AI/ML Engineer Intern
work_history.summary: Built and optimized ML and LLM models for real-world tasks. Preprocessed and curated datasets using Python and DVC. Implemented LLM-as-a-Judge (G-Eval) for model evaluation. Applied prompt engineering to improve LLM outputs. Conducted model comparison (ChatGPT vs. Gemini) for emotion detection and insights. Used technologies like Python, DVC, ML, LLM, ChatGPT, and Gemini.

work_history.title: Software Developer Intern
work_history.summary: Developed a full-stack e-commerce web app (Aura) using React.js and Node.js. Implemented authentication, product listings, cart, orders, and payment gateway UI. Gained experience in the end-to-end SDLC from planning to deployment. Deployed on Microsoft Azure with stable hosting and database connectivity. Improved performance and reliability using Git, debugging, and optimization. Used technologies like React.js, Node.js, Microsoft Azure, and Git.
